title: quercus rotundifolia f. avellaniformis
intro: Quercus rotundifolia f. avellaniformis, also known as the Holm Oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree that belongs to the Quercus genus, characterized by its distinctive rounded leaves. The medicinal properties of Quercus rotundifolia f. avellaniformis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Quercus rotundifolia f. avellaniformis typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to digestive problems and skin conditions.
